job_title: Giảng viên Cao cấp Trí tuệ Nhân tạo (Senior AI Instructor)
required_skills: Reading comprehension of technical English documents
preferred_skills: Experience implementing AI projects in industry
Ability to inspire and motivate students
Publications in reputable conferences/journals (e.g., NIPS, ICML, CVPR)
key_responsibilities: Design and deliver advanced training programs in AI, Deep Learning, and Reinforcement Learning.
Guide students in research projects and graduation theses, especially in computer vision.
Regularly update curricula to reflect the latest industry advancements.
Participate in scientific research and publish international papers.
Advise technology startup teams within the university.
